title: Purser's Embarkation Roll vs. Boat Deck Count
description: In the First Class Lounge, the ship's Purser has left his embarkation roll on the writing desk — a complete passenger and crew manifest showing 2,224 souls aboard. Next to it, in Margaret Brown's handwriting on a cocktail napkin, is a running tally of people she has personally counted entering boats: after Boats 1 through 8, her count totals 312. The official boat capacity for those eight boats is 520. The napkin and the manifest together make the arithmetic of the under-loading visible and undeniable.
